title: Zabrak diaspora music
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Zabrak diaspora music''' was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabraki]] genre of [[Music/Legends|music]] created in celebration of the Zabrak race's colonization of worlds outside [[Iridonia/Legends|Iridonia]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''
